contract_analysis.structural_notes: Synthetic fixture/demo MGC market read: a directional MGC read requires numeric DXY evidence, a yield-context reference, and a fear-catalyst reference in the recorded packet, none of which is supplied as numeric input by this fixture. The contract identified by this sidecar is MGC.
